Why claude-status-bar Is Trending

The Mobile landscape is constantly evolving, and claude-status-bar has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

Quick Start

Final Thoughts

claude-status-bar is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
